About Devdeep Systems

A turnkey systems integrator
built for mission-critical environments

Incorporated in 2022 and headquartered in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, Devdeep Systems is a DPIIT Recognized Startup and MSME with 18+ years of leadership expertise in advanced infrastructure delivery. We serve government departments, PSUs, utilities, healthcare facilities, and premier academic institutions with a singular accountability model — one SLA covering software, hardware, networking, and security.

CIN: U72900CT2022PTC012665 DPIIT Startup MSME Registered Est. Jan 20, 2022

across every operation

Devdeep Systems operates under a full ISO certification framework, ensuring every deployment meets elite global benchmarks for security, quality, safety, and environmental responsibility.

Flagship Product

Divine Hospital Information System

The only hospital management platform purpose-built and actively deployed by Devdeep Systems — integrating every clinical, administrative, and financial workflow under a single SLA-backed system.

⚕ Divine HIS — by Devdeep Systems
Clinical & administrative workflows.
One integrated platform.
Implemented across hospitals in Chhattisgarh, Divine HIS manages OPD/IPD patient flows, real-time bed tracking, pharmacy, billing, and LIMS/RIS integration — with native compliance for Ayushman Bharat and HL7/FHIR data exchange.
✓ Ayushman Bharat Ready ✓ HL7 / FHIR Compliant ✓ Offline-Capable ✓ Multi-Language Support ✓ Active Deployments in CG

IT Infrastructure

Enterprise networks designed,
cabled, and handed over complete

We don't just supply hardware. Our certified engineers plan, deploy, and commission networks from scratch — structured cabling, managed switching, VOIP telephony, MPLS/SD-WAN, and perimeter security — backed by Cisco and Fortinet OEM partnerships.

  • Cisco-certified routing, switching & unified communications
  • Fortinet Next-Gen Firewall & UTM deployment
  • BSNL FTTH, leased lines & MPLS provisioning
  • HP Enterprise compute — rack/blade servers & endpoints
  • VOIP / IP-PBX with call recording & multi-site extensions
Infrastructure Services
STQC Certified Surveillance

MeitY-compliant video surveillance
for government & enterprise

In compliance with MeitY mandates on national cyber safety and trusted source electronics procurement, Devdeep Systems designs and implements STQC-certified CCTV systems with BIS-certified hardware — deployed across government utilities, PSUs, and enterprise campuses.

  • STQC-certified surveillance hardware, firmware & IoT ecosystem
  • BIS-certified brands: CP PLUS, Honeywell, SECURUS, SPARSH
  • IP CCTV, anti-tamper dome/bullet arrays, smart recorders
  • Public utility & institutional safety networks
  • Integrated with access control and perimeter security
🛡
STQC / MeitY Compliance Fully aligned with Government of India directives on cyber-secure, domestically certified surveillance infrastructure.

    Financial Trajectory

    Consistent growth since incorporation

    From market setup to ₹1.5 Crore in FY 2025–26, Devdeep Systems has demonstrated rapid scale. Single-order execution capability up to ₹20 Lakhs per contract.

    Director's Message

    Kuldip Mahendra

    Founder & Managing Director

    In this era of digitalization, technology has proven that organisations can operate with full efficiency and safety anywhere — if the right systems are in place. In 18 years of my career, I have closely observed the IT sector across hardware, software, networking, communication, and application interfaces. Every day a new capability emerges in the corporate sector, and because of being systems-based, unlimited businesses achieve their goals irrespective of field.

    After working at a corporate hospital as IT Head for 15 years, I realised that many sectors still lack high-level IT systems. My vision is to reach these organisations and provide complete, trust-backed solutions — scalable, requirement-based, and cost-effective. Devdeep Systems exists to fill that gap between the technology builders and the organisations that need it most.

    Our Purpose

    Vision, Mission & Values

    The principles that guide every system we build and every client we serve.

    🎯
    Vision
    To provide all types of IT services required to digitalize hospitals and enterprises, through collaboration of our own staff, trusted partners, and domain experts at every level.
    🚀
    Mission
    We don't just provide a product — we provide a complete solution: Computer Hardware, Networking, Cloud Computing, Storage, Interface Applications, and deployment of HIS, LIS, RIS, PACS, QMS, and HR systems.
    ⚡
    Value
    All revenue-generating departments managed through a single control — with decision-making parameters built on quality control, turnaround time, and full transparency towards all stakeholders.

    Ready to digitize your infrastructure?

    Whether you're a government utility, multi-speciality hospital, or enterprise organization — we have the systems, certifications, and field teams to deliver.

    Our Solutions

    From Blueprint to Live Infrastructure
    We Deliver

    Every solution is purpose-engineered, OEM-certified, and delivered under a single SLA — from Divine HIS to Cisco-backed networking and STQC-certified surveillance.

    DPIIT Recognized MSME Registered ISO 27001 STQC Certified Cisco & Fortinet Partner
    Healthcare IT

    Divine HIS & Healthcare Systems

    Proprietary and integrated clinical platforms engineered for Indian healthcare — government hospitals, private multi-specialities, and diagnostic chains.

    ⚕

    Divine Hospital Information System

    Proprietary

    Devdeep Systems' flagship product. Actively deployed in hospitals across Chhattisgarh. Complete OPD/IPD management, pharmacy, billing, lab, and HRMS in one platform.

    • OPD registration & multi-service visit management
    • Real-time IPD bed tracking — ICU, general, private
    • Dynamic billing with PDF/Excel export
    • Native LIMS, RIS & HRMS integration
    • Ayushman Bharat & HL7/FHIR ready
    🔬

    Laboratory Information System (LIMS)

    Sample tracking, result management, and analyzer interfacing for diagnostic labs and hospital laboratories.

    • Barcode-based sample tracking
    • Multi-analyzer instrument interface
    • Automated result validation & QC
    • Digital report delivery (SMS/WhatsApp/email)
    🩻

    Radiology Information System (RIS / PACS)

    DICOM-compliant radiology workflow management with teleradiology support and HIS integration.

    • DICOM image storage & web viewer
    • Radiology worklist & scheduling
    • Structured radiologist reporting
    • Teleradiology & remote reading
    📋

    Electronic Medical Records (EMR)

    Structured, searchable clinical records built for FHIR compliance and national health system interoperability.

    • Structured clinical documentation
    • Prescription & order management
    • Patient history timeline
    • ABHA / NMC integration ready
    Enterprise Software

    Business Systems & Platforms

    Modular, configurable enterprise platforms for organizations requiring financial, HR, and operational visibility.

    📦

    Enterprise ERP

    Finance, procurement, inventory, GST compliance, and management reporting for SMEs and enterprise organizations.

    • GST-compliant financial accounting
    • Procurement & purchase management
    • Inventory & warehouse management
    • Custom BI dashboards
    🤝

    CRM

    Lead tracking, pipeline management, and service desk for B2B and healthcare organizations.

    • Lead & opportunity pipeline
    • Customer 360 profiles
    • Service & support ticketing
    • Sales analytics
    👥

    HRMS & Payroll

    Full HR lifecycle from onboarding to payroll with EPF, ESIC, and statutory compliance built-in.

    • Attendance & leave management
    • Payroll processing & salary slips
    • PF, ESIC & labour compliance
    • Performance management

    Case Studies

    Real Deployments.
    Verified Results.

    Implementations across hospitals, government utilities, and enterprise organizations in Chhattisgarh and central India.

    Healthcare · Divine HISChhattisgarh · 2023

    Multi-Speciality Hospital — Full Digitization with Divine HIS

    A 120-bed private hospital in central Chhattisgarh operating entirely on paper-based records. Billing delays, lost lab results, and zero management visibility prompted a full HIS deployment.

    Challenge

    Paper-based OPD, IPD, pharmacy, and lab records. Average billing time exceeded 45 minutes. Lab results frequently misplaced. No management dashboard or audit trail.

    Solution Delivered

    Full Divine HIS deployment: patient registration, OPD/IPD, pharmacy, billing, and LIMS. 3-week onsite training. Complete handover documentation and SLA agreement.

    Outcome
    ↓ 78%

    Reduction in billing time. Lab TAT improved 60%. Full management visibility within 6 weeks of go-live.

    Enterprise · ERP + HRMSRaipur · 2024

    Manufacturing Enterprise — ERP & HRMS Consolidation

    A mid-size Raipur manufacturing firm with disconnected spreadsheets, inventory discrepancies, and manual payroll for 200+ employees required a complete digital backbone.

    Challenge

    No single source of truth across procurement, inventory, and finance. Monthly reconciliation took 5+ days. Manual payroll for 200 employees causing errors every cycle.

    Solution Delivered

    Modular ERP covering procurement, inventory, GST finance, and reporting. HRMS deployed with biometric attendance integration and automated payroll.

    Outcome
    ↓ 90%

    Reconciliation time reduced. Payroll processed in under 2 hours. Zero payroll errors for 8 consecutive months post-deployment.

    Infrastructure · MPLS + VOIP + LIMSMulti-site · 2023

    Diagnostic Chain — 7-Site Connectivity & Unified LIMS

    A diagnostic chain with 6 collection centres and 1 central processing lab needed secure, reliable multi-site connectivity and real-time lab data synchronization.

    Challenge

    Isolated branches with no central visibility. Staff using personal phones for communication. LIMS data not synchronized — results printed only at central lab.

    Solution Delivered

    MPLS connectivity across all 7 sites. Centralized VOIP with extensions at each location. Unified LIMS installation with real-time data at HQ, accessible from all branches.

    Outcome
    6 Sites

    Connected in 3 weeks. Communication costs reduced 65%. Real-time lab data available at all branches simultaneously.
